title: Simply Fantastical Origins
description: A collection of simple fantasy origins based on classic species like dwarves, elves, orcs, and dragonborn. All origins are impact level 1 and specifically made to have little to no downsides.
body:
Adds several simple fantasy origins to the Origins mod
### Dragonborn
Humanoid descendants of the most powerful creatures in history, Dragonborn still retain some of their ancestors' mythical capabilities.
### Dwarf
Dwarves are a species of miners, adapted to the caves and often found in them. They are a secretive sort and little is known about them save that they greatly dislike elves.
### Elf
Elves are a sophisticated but arrogant sort, believing themselves to be above all others. Their attitude is generally considered annoying, but none can deny the power of their archery.
### Halfling
Halflings are a small species, naturally attuned to nature.
### Lizardfolk
Lizardfolk are an amphibious species of poison-resistant reptillians, often found in swamps and similar biomes.
### Orc
Orcs are a powerful species of great stature and vitality, capable of incredible feats of strength.
### Tabaxi
Tabaxi are a small and delicate species, but make up for it with their unmatched agility reminiscent of their feline cousins.
### Tiefling
Tieflings are a demonic people born of fire, harnessing its power to slay their foes.
### Gargoyle
Squat, stony sentinels. Gargoyles are a monstrous species.
### Goblin
Little-small sneaky monster-peoples. Muchly fast-speedy and lucky.
### Ogre
A very big and tough monstrous species.
### Wraith
They are always there. Especially when you do not see them.
